# jellyfin_livetv_configuration (Resource)

Manages the Jellyfin Live TV configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "jellyfin_livetv_configuration" "example" {
  guide_days           = 14
  recording_path       = "/recordings"
  pre_padding_seconds  = 30
  post_padding_seconds = 30
  save_recording_nfo   = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `enable_original_audio_with_encoded_recordings` (Boolean) Whether original audio is kept with encoded recordings.
- `enable_recording_subfolders` (Boolean) Whether recording subfolders are enabled.
- `guide_days` (Number) Number of guide days.
- `listing_providers` (Attributes List) Listing providers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--listing_providers))
- `media_locations_created` (List of String) Media locations created.
- `movie_recording_path` (String) Movie recording path.
- `post_padding_seconds` (Number) Post-padding seconds.
- `pre_padding_seconds` (Number) Pre-padding seconds.
- `recording_path` (String) Recording path.
- `recording_post_processor` (String) Recording post processor.
- `recording_post_processor_arguments` (String) Recording post processor arguments.
- `save_recording_images` (Boolean) Whether to save recording images.
- `save_recording_nfo` (Boolean) Whether to save recording NFO.
- `series_recording_path` (String) Series recording path.
- `tuner_hosts` (Attributes List) Tuner hosts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tuner_hosts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier. Always set to `livetv` for this singleton resource.

<a id="nestedatt--listing_providers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `listing_providers`

Optional:

- `channel_mappings` (Attributes List) Channel mappings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--listing_providers--channel_mappings))
- `country` (String) Country.
- `enable_all_tuners` (Boolean) Enable all tuners.
- `enabled_tuners` (List of String) Enabled tuners.
- `id` (String) Provider ID.
- `kids_categories` (List of String) Kids categories.
- `listings_id` (String) Listings ID.
- `movie_categories` (List of String) Movie categories.
- `movie_prefix` (String) Movie prefix.
- `news_categories` (List of String) News categories.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password.
- `path` (String) Path.
- `preferred_language` (String) Preferred language.
- `sports_categories` (List of String) Sports categories.
- `type` (String) Provider type.
- `user_agent` (String) User agent.
- `username` (String) Username.
- `zip_code` (String) ZIP code.

<a id="nestedatt--listing_providers--channel_mappings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `listing_providers.channel_mappings`

Optional:

- `name` (String) Channel name.
- `value` (String) Mapped value.



<a id="nestedatt--tuner_hosts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tuner_hosts`

Optional:

- `allow_fmp4_transcoding_container` (Boolean) Allow fmp4 transcoding container.
- `allow_hw_transcoding` (Boolean) Allow hardware transcoding.
- `allow_stream_sharing` (Boolean) Allow stream sharing.
- `device_id` (String) Device ID.
- `enable_stream_looping` (Boolean) Enable stream looping.
- `fallback_max_streaming_bitrate` (Number) Fallback max streaming bitrate.
- `friendly_name` (String) Friendly name.
- `id` (String) Tuner host ID.
- `ignore_dts` (Boolean) Ignore DTS.
- `import_favorites_only` (Boolean) Import favorites only.
- `read_at_native_framerate` (Boolean) Read at native framerate.
- `source` (String) Source.
- `tuner_count` (Number) Tuner count.
- `type` (String) Tuner host type.
- `url` (String) Tuner host URL.
- `user_agent` (String) User agent.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import jellyfin_livetv_configuration.example singleton
```
